allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/pokemon.json'\)\); print\(f'pokemon.json: {len\(d\)} entries'\); print\('Sample keys:', list\(d.get\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)[0], {}\).keys\(\)\) if d else 'empty'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/specialties.json'\)\); print\(f'specialties.json: {len\(d\)} entries'\); keys=list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:3]; print\('First 3 keys:', keys\); print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(d[keys[0]], indent=2\)[:300]\)")
